Package for decoding Line E (14) instructions - Shift/Rotate/Bit Field

parameters.name: self
parameters.description:
3 for ASL/ASR/LSL/LSR, ROL/ROR, ROXL/ROXR 1 operand

0 for ASL/ASR, 2 for ROXL/ROXR, 3 for ROL/ROR,
1for LSL/LSR 1 operand

0 for ASL/ASR 2 operand, 1 for LSL/LSR,
2 for ROXL/ROXR, 3 for ROL/ROR
